title: Skypiea Sees the Storm
description: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: No matter how much you struggle...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No, not that sharp of a turn!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop destroying my shoes- trial city!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Wyper and the God's not here too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They must've made their way up!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, I see... Let's keep going then.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The ship's heading towards the golden bell...!

summary: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
